hero.title: MyGallery
hero.guestSubtitle: Discover the works shared by our community
hero.guestDescription: Explore the beautiful albums created by our users. To share your own memories and create your albums, sign in or create a free account!
hero.userDescription: Organize your most beautiful memories, create your albums and share them with your loved ones. Your personal gallery awaits!

about.title: About MyGallery
about.subtitle: A friendly space where your memories come to life and are shared
about.description1: Welcome to {appName}, your personal space to organize and share what really matters. Here, every photo tells a story, every album captures a precious moment. Whether you want to relive your adventures, share your best moments with loved ones, or simply keep track of your memories, you're in the right place.
about.description2: Our philosophy? Combining simplicity and professionalism. You keep full control over your creations while enjoying a modern and intuitive interface. Create, organize, share... freely and securely.
about.techDescription: MyGallery is built with the most modern web technologies

creativity.title: Unlimited creativity
creativity.description: Create as many albums as you want and bring all your photo projects to life

sharing.title: Share your emotions
sharing.description: Share your albums with friends, family and discover their creations

control.title: You're in control
control.description: Your albums, your rules: only you decide what you share and what you keep

design.title: Inspiring design
design.description: An elegant and modern interface that enhances your photos

simplicity.title: Simplicity first
simplicity.description: Upload, organize and share in just a few clicks

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For any inquiries, projects or collaborations, feel free to contact me directly by email.

footer.fullDescription: We help creators and businesses present their images with elegance. Gallery solutions, album management and professional integration.

auth.signInDescription: Log in to your personal space to find your albums and share your memories.
auth.signUpDescription: Create a free account to organize your photos into albums and share them with your loved ones.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

profile.title: My Profile
profile.confirmSaveDescription: Are you sure you want to save these changes?
profile.confirmCancelDescription: You have unsaved changes. Do you really want to leave without saving?

album.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the album "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
